---
title: "i-PI 3.0: a flexible, efficient framework for advanced atomistic simulations"
author: ["Yair Litman","Venkat Kapil", "Yotam MY Feldman", "Davide Tisi", "Tomislav Begušić", "Karen Fidanyan", "Guillaume Fraux", "Jacob Higer", "Matthias Kellner", "Tao E Li", "Eszter S Pós", "Elia Stocco", "George Trenins", "Barak Hirshberg", "Mariana Rossi", "Michele Ceriotti"]
date: 2024-07-20
publication: "J. Chem. Phys. **161**, 062504 (2024)"
categories: ["quantum_dynamics"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1063/5.0215869 
url_preprint: 
journ: "J. Chem. Phys."
issue: 161
page: 062504
year: 2024
image: featured.png
pub_number: 28
---
